ddls:
CREATE TABLE "economic_cycles" (
  "cycle_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each economic cycle */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the economic cycle */,
  "trough_date" TEXT /* Date when the trough occurred */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the economic cycle or recovery date */,
  "depth" REAL /* Depth of the economic decline (negative growth) */,
  "length" INTEGER /* Length of the economic cycle in days */,
  "to_trough" INTEGER /* Duration in days from the start to the trough */,
  "recovery" REAL /* Recovery value indicating the extent of economic recovery */,
  "country_code" TEXT /* Country code where the economic cycle occurred */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region within the country where the economic cycle occurred */,
  "gdp_change" REAL /* Change in GDP during the cycle */,
  "unemployment_rate_change" REAL /* Change in unemployment rate during the cycle */,
  "inflation_rate_change" REAL /* Change in inflation rate during the cycle */,
  "cause" TEXT /* Primary cause of the economic downturn */,
  "major_events" TEXT /* Major events or factors that influenced the cycle (JSON array) */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the economic data */,
  "data_reliability" INTEGER /* Reliability rating of the data (1-5) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cycle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for login */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address for contact */,
  "role" TEXT /* User role (e.g., analyst, admin, guest) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role (JSON array) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the users table */,
  "cycle_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the economic_cycles table */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Level of access (e.g., read, write, full) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "collaboration" (
  "collab_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collaboration record */,
  "cycle_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the economic_cycles table */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the users table */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes or insights provided by the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the note was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the note was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collab_id")
)
